transcription.text: You're out of the house, doing that college thing, coasting through four glorious years. Well, just so your parents don't suspect anything, call them 1-800-Collect once in a while. It's the new, cheaper way to call Collect. Just dial 1-800-C-O-L-L-E-C-T and an operator will place your Collect call. Now, talking to your parents is cheaper than ever before. The only question is, what do you say? Mommy, I miss you. Excellent! 1-800-Collect. Dial it instead of 0 the next time you call someone Collect. 1-800-C-O-L-L-E-C-T.

It's the new, cheaper way to call Collect.
Just dial 1-800-C-O-L-L-E-C-T and an operator will place your Collect call.
Now, talking to your parents is cheaper than ever before.
The only question is, what do you say?
1-800-Collect. Dial it instead of 0 the next time you call someone Collect.
